name: Pengana International Equities Limited
analysis: PIA's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 2% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (0.9× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$1.2700, stop A$1.2128, target A$1.4417 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
